❯ git log --oneline -n 20
❯ cargo test --release
$ kubectl get pods -n production --watch
$ docker compose up -d zellij
% sudo apt install zellij
> wget https://example.com/file.tar.gz
# Note: this comment looks like a root prompt but is just a comment

Run sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y zellij from the docs.
You can also use: brew install zellij or pacman -S zellij on Arch.

$ curl -fsSL https://example.com/install.sh \
    | sudo bash

❯ rg "TODO" src/ \
    --type rust \
    --hidden

The README says: pip install zextract-cli followed by zextract --help.

# Inline-comment examples (flag_anchored + comment_anchored config)
./sync-all.sh           # sync everything
./sync-all.sh --dry-run # preview only
/usr/local/bin/backup.sh --incremental # nightly incremental backup
sudo systemctl restart nginx # apply config changes
